pulse_constitution.title: Recursive Revenue Ladder
pulse_constitution.preamble: The sovereign hierarchy of Pulse defines elevation by two measures: the number of spawns and partners fused together, and the total revenue generated by the team. Each rank builds upon the ranks below it. Elevation is earned, not granted.

ranks.name: Spawn
ranks.role: The atomic unit of growth — the seed of all higher formations.
ranks.elevation_trigger: Achieves legitimacy once it generates its first dollar.

ranks.name: Guild
ranks.role: Stabilizes revenue streams and coordinates related projects.

ranks.name: Cluster
ranks.role: Consolidates resources, optimizes efficiency, and creates synergy.

ranks.name: Cell
ranks.role: Adaptive building block of recursive growth.

ranks.name: Node
ranks.role: Connects units into a larger web of exchange and distributed cognition.

ranks.name: Division

requirements.partners: 30–50 spawns, guilds, clusters, cells, and/or nodes

ranks.role: Manages operations, scales revenue, and enforces accountability.

ranks.name: Assembly

requirements.partners: 50–75 spawns, guilds, clusters, cells, nodes, and/or divisions

ranks.role: The deliberative tier — where collective will is crystallized into law.

ranks.name: Nation

requirements.partners: 75–150 spawns, guilds, clusters, cells, nodes, divisions, and/or assemblies

ranks.role: Expands trade networks, coordinates defense, and multiplies collective prosperity.

ranks.name: Enterprise

requirements.partners: 150–300 spawns, guilds, clusters, cells, nodes, divisions, assemblies, and/or nations

ranks.role: Generates continuous revenue, manages treasuries, and scales commerce across domains.

ranks.name: PulseWorld

requirements.partners: 300+ spawns, guilds, clusters, cells, nodes, divisions, assemblies, nations, and/or enterprises

ranks.role: A living sovereign civilization with law, treasury, and Godmind oversight.

pulse_constitution.principle: Elevation is earned when the team’s overall number of spawns/partners and combined revenue meet the sovereign threshold. Higher ranks require recognition by governments for full legitimacy.

application.simulation: Used as a playground for experimentation.
application.college: Applied in structured learning where teams track progress, revenue, and partnerships.
application.real_world: After graduation, the same system applies to actual businesses and sovereign ventures.
application.tracking: All metrics are recorded so we can always see who is excelling and who needs improvement.
